column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Northern Gydan (G2) Vegetation Plots

Dataset Reference: Telyatnikov, M. Y., Troeva, E. I., Ermokhina, K. A., & Pristyazhnyuk, A. (2019). Vegetation of the two regions of the northern part of the Gydan Peninsula (the subzone of typical tundras). Turczaninowia, 22(4), 128–144. https://doi.org/10.14258/turczaninowia.22.4.14
Dataset Table: Modified Species Cover Data for Northern Gydan (G2)

Dataset Notes: Percentage species cover scale is used. Taxa are listed in alphabetical order. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
